command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== APPEND ADDENDUM TO HANDOFF ==='
echo '' | base64 -d | ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     'cat >> /home/jose/moreno-ai/memory/operator/handoff/latest-claude-handoff.md && echo APPENDED' 2>&1

echo '=== COMMIT FINAL HANDOFF ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
git config user.email "claude@moreno-ai" 2>/dev/null
git config user.name "Claude (ecosystem session)" 2>/dev/null
git add memory/operator/handoff/latest-claude-handoff.md
git commit -m "handoff: Claude session final — pipeline PROVEN end-to-end, job 142938Z completed"
git push origin main 2>&1 | tail -3
git log --oneline -2
' 2>&1

echo DONE_1987
